title: NCEM Drop - Inactivation of sample on grid (TM-014)
guidelines: {"blocks":[{"key":"27ct7","text":"This procedure is used for inactivation of 3Z agents, useful if the virus has low titire.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Immerse grid in drop of 2.5 % volume Glutaraldehyde aqueous solution 25% EM Grade ampoules ProSciTech Catalog #C002 (CAS: 111-30-8) in 0.1 Molarity (M) Sorenson's phosphate buffer 00:10:00
Using filter paper wick excess buffer from grid - do not dry out, leave grid surface wet.
Stain nano-W Contributed by users Catalog ##2018-5ML 00:01:00
Using filter paper gradually wick stain dry from grid
creator: sandra.crameri
